compatibility.migration_notes: Initial workflow state-machine registry entry derived from services/layer4-agents/src/models/workflow_config.py.

governance.review_requirement: Contract Council review for state, transition, invariant, or tool/prompt binding changes.
governance.approval_threshold: Two reviewers representing Layer 4 and Platform Contracts.
governance.rollout_policy: CI warning mode first; runtime transition enforcement is feature-flagged.
governance.deprecation_policy: Maintain prior workflow version until in-flight checkpoints can be migrated or expired.
